channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Economic confidence decline raises concerns for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections
item.description: A recent Gallup poll indicating a sharp drop in public confidence about the U.S. economy has sparked concern among Republican lawmakers and political analysts as the country approaches the midterm ele...

item.title: Mayors’ coalition criticizes Senate over prolonged absence of Sen. Bato dela Rosa and salary concerns
item.description: A coalition of Philippine local executives under Mayors for Good Governance has publicly criticized the Senate over the prolonged absence of Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, raising concerns about acc...

item.title: Zanzibar hosts regional workshop on blue economy for sustainable development
item.description: Zanzibar is currently hosting the 29th Annual Research Workshop, bringing together key stakeholders from Tanzania and international partners to discuss the future of the blue economy and its role in p...

item.title: Haryana CM says youth support for PM Modi remains strong amid ‘Cockroach Janta Party’ controversy
item.description: Haryana Chief Minister Nayab Singh Saini has dismissed suggestions that the so-called ‘Cockroach Janta Party (CJP)’ reflects any real dissatisfaction among young people with Prime Minister Narendra Mo...

item.title: Missing Mossel Bay couple found dead in Kruger National Park; investigation into possible hijacking
item.description: An elderly couple from Mossel Bay, Dina Marais (73) and Ernst Marais (71), were found dead in Kruger National Park after going missing during what was meant to be a holiday trip. The couple entered th...

item.title: Opposition parties criticise Tamil Nadu government over recent crimes and law and order concerns
item.description: Leaders from several opposition parties in Tamil Nadu strongly criticised the ruling TVK government headed by Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay over the recent rise in crimes and alleged deterioration of...

item.title: India tops world in issuing Nagoya Protocol compliance certificates for genetic resource access
item.description: India has emerged as the global leader in issuing Internationally Recognised Certificates of Compliance (IRCCs) under the Nagoya Protocol, which governs access to genetic resources and associated trad...

item.title: Greek swimmer earns $1m bonus after fastest 50m freestyle at controversial Enhanced Games in Las Vegas
item.description: Greek swimmer Kristian Gkolomeev has claimed a $1 million bonus after recording a 50m freestyle time of 20.81 seconds at the Enhanced Games in Las Vegas, an event that promotes the use of performance-...

item.title: Analyst says Trump’s criticism of Obama-era Iran deal highlights similarities between nuclear agreements
item.description: Veteran diplomat and foreign policy analyst Richard Haass argued that Donald Trump’s repeated criticism of Barack Obama’s 2015 Iran nuclear agreement may inadvertently highlight how similar the two ad...

item.title: The 1984 John Boulware Crash Photo and the Controversy of the “Screaming Spirit” Image
item.description: The article recounts a tragic 1984 car accident involving 16-year-old John Boulware, who was a passenger in a vehicle traveling with three friends to a Prince concert in St. Paul, Minnesota. On Decemb...

item.title: Neale Daniher remembered after passing aged 65 following long battle with motor neurone disease
item.description: Former AFL player and Melbourne coach Neale Daniher has died at the age of 65 after a long and highly public battle with motor neurone disease (MND). His death, confirmed on Monday, prompted widesprea...

item.title: Federal NDP examines Nova Scotia strategy as a model for party renewal
item.description: The article reports that the federal New Democratic Party (NDP) is looking to Nova Scotia as a potential model for rebuilding and strengthening its political strategy. Party leadership is reflecting o...

item.title: Police Reshuffle Follows Security Breach During President Ruto’s Kilifi Rally
item.description: The National Police Service has carried out a major reshuffle within the Presidential Escort Unit (PEU) after a security breach involving President William Ruto during a public event in Ganze, Kilifi ...

item.title: Archaeological Discoveries in Mara Reveal Ancient East African Connections and Growing Threats to Heritage Sites
item.description: New archaeological research in Tanzania’s Mara Region is revealing important evidence that ancient communities around Lake Victoria were more connected than previously thought. Excavations in areas su...

item.title: How alcohol affects sleep quality and why it is not a reliable sleep aid
item.description: This article by Dr. Rébecca Robillard examines the complex relationship between alcohol consumption and sleep quality. While many people believe alcohol helps them fall asleep more easily, the science...

item.title: Angeles City hotel guest recalls waking up to nearby building collapse; at least four dead
item.description: A devastating building collapse in Angeles City, Pampanga has left at least four people dead, 17 missing, and 26 others rescued, according to authorities as search and rescue operations continue. The ...

item.title: Environmental coalition proposes expanding local water supply in Southern California to 85% by 2045, opposing Delta tunnel project
item.description: A coalition of environmental and conservation groups is urging Southern California to dramatically increase its reliance on locally sourced water, arguing that the region could meet up to 85% of its w...

item.title: PDP delegation condoles Governor Makinde over Oyo school abductions and killings
item.description: Leaders of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) have paid a condolence visit to the Governor of Oyo State, Seyi Makinde, following a disturbing kidnapping incident that affected schools in the state. Th...

item.title: Tooth to host intimate release party for debut EP ‘Restless In Bloom’ at Soho’s The Blue Posts
item.description: London rock band Tooth are preparing to celebrate the release of their debut EP ‘Restless In Bloom’ with a series of intimate events, including a special release party at Soho pub The Blue Posts on 12...

item.title: Dye & Durham appoints Mary Filippelli as board chair and adds Tyler Proud to board
